ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the driver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the driver */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the driver */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "car_number" TEXT /* Number of the car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity of the car (in liters) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who owns the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "point_structure" TEXT /* Point structure of the series */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track (in miles) */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track (e.g., asphalt, dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the event belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the event takes place */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., practice, qualifying, race) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES racing_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car used by the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the event */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team owner, driver) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver (if the user is a driver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_teams" (
  "driver_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver-team association */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the association */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES racing_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_teams_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points of the driver in the series */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES racing_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "predicted_position" INTEGER /* Predicted position of the driver in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
